---
title: "Projects"
---

### [Greenspace and Heat Exposure Dashboard](https://ivannadeanda.shinyapps.io/ile_dashboard/)
This is a dashboard that displays findings from some of the research I conducted for my Master's thesis.

<div class="row">

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://ivannadeanda.shinyapps.io/ile_dashboard/" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Greenspace and Heat Exposure Dashboard</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>This is a dashboard that displays findings from some of the research I conducted for my Master's thesis.</p>
</div>
